description: Create a circular Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax titled "Software Development Life Cycle". The diagram must include six phases arranged in a continuous clockwise ring: Requirements, Design, Implementation, Testing, Deployment, and Maintenance, connected by directional arrows forming a complete cycle. Save the diagram to ~/Documents/sdlc_lifecycle.eddx and export it as a PNG to ~/Documents/sdlc_lifecycle.png.
